description: The highest quality and modern books await you in our online store — with fast delivery and affordable prices.

metadata.title: Best books, fast delivery and great prices!

features.heading: Book shopping has never been this easy
features.subheading: Thousands of books, fast delivery, secure checkout — all in one place.

catalog.title: Huge catalog
catalog.description: Thousands of titles from Uzbek, Russian and international publishers. Filter by genre, author, or topic.

delivery.title: Fast delivery
delivery.description: Order from anywhere — we'll bring it straight to your door, nationwide.

search.title: Smart search
search.description: Find any book instantly by title, author, or ISBN. Search understands both Uzbek and Russian.

payment.title: Secure payment
payment.description: Click, Payme, or bank card — choose your preferred method. Every transaction is encrypted.

recommendations.title: Personal picks
recommendations.description: We recommend new books based on your reading history and favourite genres.

support.title: 24/7 support
support.description: Got a question? Our team is always ready via chat, phone, or Telegram.

notFound.title: Page Not Found !
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved to another address.
